issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 HONDA CROSSTOUR. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 15 MPH, THE VEHICLE STALLED WITHOUT WARNING. ADDITIONALLY, THE CONTACT HEARD AN ABNORMAL WHINING SOUND UNDER THE HOOD WHILE ATTEMPTING TO START THE VEHICLE. ASSUMING THAT THE BATTERY WAS PROBABLY DEFECTIVE,

APRIL 24TH I NOTICED THE PAINT BUBBLING UP ON THE ROOF OF THE CAR. CONTACTED THE DEALERSHIP ABOUT THE PROBLEMS AND THEY AGREED TO PAINT THE AFFECTED AREA UNDER A " IN GOOD FAITH " WHERE THEY PAID 70% AND WE PAID 30%. A MONTH OR SO AFTER THE CAR WAS RETURNED I FOUND A WHOLE SHEET

narrative.headline: What 2015 Honda Crosstour owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 24 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (54% of reports).
